docket_entries.description: ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT GRANTED**

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUI, SPENCER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TARCHER, BENJAMIN DBA BEN TARCHER & ASSOCIATES CONTRACT SIGNED BY PARTIES REQUIRES MEDIATION, AND ARBITRATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-15-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-31-2023 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED DEC-30-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TARCHER, BENJAMIN DBA BEN TARCHER & ASSOCIATES
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL REQUESTED BY DEFENDANT **GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-10-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SPENCER HUI IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT BENJAMIN TARCHER IS PRESENT. ***DEFENDANT WILL NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM.*** PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
